title: Ops: Self-Repair & Innovation
description: Detect degraded git state, trigger self-repair routines, clean up stale artifacts, and propose innovative improvements based on skill coverage analysis.

use_cases.name: Abort Pending Rebase
use_cases.action: Executes `git rebase --abort` in workspace root; records 'rebase_aborted' on success

use_cases.name: Abort Pending Merge
use_cases.action: Executes `git merge --abort` in workspace root; records 'merge_aborted' on success

use_cases.name: Remove Stale index.lock
use_cases.action: Checks .git/index.lock age vs LOCK_MAX_AGE_MS; if exceeded, deletes lock file and records 'stale_lock_removed'

use_cases.name: Hard Reset to origin/main
use_cases.action: Fetches origin/main then `git reset --hard origin/main`; records 'hard_reset_to_origin'. Guard: env var EVOLVE_GIT_RESET=true

use_cases.name: Safe Fetch from Origin
use_cases.action: Executes `git fetch origin` with 30s timeout; records 'fetch_ok'

use_cases.name: Generate Innovation Ideas
use_cases.action: Lists skills via listSkills(); categorises into feishu/dev/media/security/automation/data buckets; identifies 2 weakest categories; produces up to 3 targeted improvement suggestions

use_cases.name: Clean Up Aged GEP Artifacts (Age-Based)
use_cases.action: Scans EvolutionDir for gep_prompt_*.json/txt; skips MIN_KEEP newest; deletes files older than CLEANUP_MAX_AGE_MS via safeBatchDelete()

use_cases.name: Clean Up GEP Artifacts (Count Cap)
use_cases.action: After age-based pass, re-scans dir; if count > CLEANUP_MAX_FILES, deletes oldest excess files

include_extend_relationships: UC4 extends UC5 (hard reset is the exceptional path guarded by EVOLVE_GIT_RESET env var; default is safe fetch)
UC8 extends UC7 (count-cap phase runs after age-based phase within same run() call)
UC6 includes UC6a:listSkills (always called as prerequisite)

config_parameters.CLEANUP_MAX_AGE_MS: Max age of GEP artifact files before deletion
config_parameters.CLEANUP_MIN_KEEP: Minimum number of newest GEP files always retained
config_parameters.CLEANUP_MAX_FILES: Hard cap on total GEP artifact files (default 10)

important_notes: All three modules are independently runnable as CLI scripts (require.main === module guard).
self_repair.js covers 4 distinct repair sub-cases; all silently catch errors to remain non-fatal.
innovation.js never modifies state — read-only analysis returning top-3 string suggestions.
cleanup.js is the only module that deletes files; two-phase strategy (age then count cap).
No shared state between modules; each resolves its own paths via gep/paths helpers.
